headline: 3 Energy Stocks to Buy in July
summary: Energy stocks just gave investors a buying window. After WTI crude spiked to $114.58 per barrel on April 7, on the Strait of Hormuz disruption, prices have cooled to $78.94 per barrel as of June 22, dragging the three integrated majors down with them. Exxon Mobil is off 6% over the past month, Chevron is ... 3 Energy Stocks to Buy in July

headline: Mid-Year 2026 Market Outlook: Oil, Gold, And Copper
